question: In Romans, what does Paul say about those who call on the name of the Lord?

choices.A: Everyone who calls on the name of the Lord will be saved
choices.B: Only Jews who call on the name of the Lord will be saved
choices.C: Only priests who call on the name of the Lord will be saved
choices.D: No one who calls on the name of the Lord will be saved

teaching.title: Calling on the Lord
teaching.body: Paul states that everyone who calls on the name of the Lord will be saved, quoting the wording found in the prophets.
